Class AbstractDataRetrievalService

java.lang.Object
de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboard.services.AbstractDataRetrievalService
All Implemented Interfaces:
DataRetrievalService
Direct Known Subclasses:
AcuwaveDataRetrievalService, FhirDataRetrievalService
public abstract class AbstractDataRetrievalService extends Object implements DataRetrievalService
All methods for retrieving the data required for the Corona dashboard from any supported server.
